title: Won't Get Fooled Again
why_this_song: Won't Get Fooled Again by The Who (1971) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Take a bow for the new revolution
Smile and grin at the change all around me
Pick up my guitar and play

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "i'll" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "i'll" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "smile" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "smile" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: We'll be fighting in the streets
We were liberated from the fold, that's all

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: With our children at our feet
And I'll get on my knees and pray
And the beards have all grown longer overnight

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Won't Get Fooled Again" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Won't Get Fooled Again" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Won't Get Fooled Again" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Won't Get Fooled Again", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Won't Get Fooled Again" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Won't Get Fooled Again" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Won't Get Fooled Again" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Won't Get Fooled Again" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?
